Data Processing Addendum Schedule and Cross-Border Transfer Approval — Rivanta Capital Markets Limited (India) — Ref: RCML-DPA-26/118
Parties: Rivanta Capital Markets Limited (Company ID RCML-09X77) as Data Fiduciary; Rivanta Analytics Pte. Ltd. (Processor) for analytics support; client onboarding under Brokerage Onboarding Form RCMX-ONB-04 for retail and guardian-led accounts.
Purpose and data categories: KYC/AML onboarding and service delivery; identifiers may include Aadhaar, PAN, and GSTIN where provided, stored in masked/hashed form (e.g., last 4 digits only for verification logs), with data minimisation applied to non-essential fields.
Lawful basis and consent: Processing under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023; explicit consent captured via otp-based e-consent; for Data Principals under 18, verifiable parental consent is required and recorded; consent can be withdrawn without affecting compliance-mandated records.
DSAR handling: Data Principal may submit access/correction/erasure requests via dp-requests@rivanta.example.in or the portal at https://privacy.rivanta.example.in; identity is verified without retaining full Aadhaar/PAN copies beyond verification metadata.
Consent withdrawal event: On 02 May 2026, Mr. Devanth Oorvak withdrew marketing consent; service delivery continued with profiling disabled and marketing cookies off; the withdrawal does not extend to SEBI/PMLA-mandated logs.
Erasure event: On 18 April 2026, erasure completed for guardian-supplied minor contact fields for Ms. Arohi Vartesh’s ward (under 18) — audit ref ER-04-26-772; backups scheduled for cryptographic erasure on next 30-day cycle; no trading history was deleted.
Retention schedule: KYC documents retained for 8 years post-relationship termination to meet securities and anti-money laundering obligations; trade confirmations retained for 7 years; insider lists retained during the life of mandate plus 5 years; data minimisation applied by tokenising Aadhaar/PAN immediately after verification.
Cross-border transfer: Export Approval EA-2026-118 authorises transfer of masked KYC metadata and non-personal trade analytics to Rivanta Analytics Pte. Ltd., Singapore; transfer governed by contractual clauses consistent with DPDPA cross-border notifications; no full Aadhaar/PAN/GSTIN values are exported.
MNPI/UPSI controls: No unpublished price sensitive information relating to listed securities was included in the export; Rivanta maintains a ring-fenced insider list for Velora AgroTech Limited (listed on Indraprastha Stock Exchange code VALT) under SEBI (PIT) norms, and the trading window was closed at the time of export.
Negative/precision note: This approval does not authorise marketing repurposing or sale of personal data; it is a completed control record and not an indicator of an active incident or live transfer risk.
Children’s data policy: We do not onboard direct child investors; only guardian accounts are supported, and minor profile fields are limited to initials and birth month for eligibility checks.
DSAR completion example: Access request AR-26-0441 for Mr. Kavinth Jorander was fulfilled on 09 May 2026 with redacted document images and field-level provenance; correction of address completed without retaining previous proof beyond hash.
Contact and grievance: Data Protection Officer — Mr. Sudhan Girel, dpo@rivanta.example.in; Grievance Officer — Ms. Tishya Norvel, grievance@rivanta.example.in; postal: Privacy Office, Rivanta House, 12 Vistar Park, New Chennai 600197 (fictional).
Security and audits: Annual privacy audits completed Q1 2026; encryption at rest and in transit implemented; access to UPSI is segregated and monitored; no SEBI show cause notices are outstanding as of this memo.
End of Schedule: If consent is withdrawn or erasure is requested, we will apply changes prospectively and update downstream processors within 10 business days, subject to statutory retention.
